refs.description: Iterative and recursive ternary search over a sorted array, with a precision-based switch to linear search.
Generic recursive ternary search implementing the SearchAlgorithm interface, dividing the sorted range at mid1 and mid2.
Reference article and C++ implementation using ternary search to maximize a unimodal function with a fixed iteration count.
Module using one_third/two_third split points and a precision constant to drive the ternary search loops.
